use_cases: Display customer testimonials with star ratings and author attribution
Showcase social proof with animated entrance effects on product or service pages
Present reviews in a staggered grid layout for portfolio or landing pages
ai_summary: A reusable testimonial card component featuring star ratings, quote display, and author avatar with dark mode support. Built with Framer Motion for staggered fade-in animations and subtle hover scale effects. Uses Tailwind CSS for styling with rounded corners, shadows, and responsive layout.
